expression.expression: (FIRST_VALUE(codigo_team_actual) OVER (PARTITION BY codigo_oficial, AAAAMM ORDER BY fecha_dato RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW))
CAST((CASE WHEN (codigo_team IS NULL) THEN CodTeamBusqueda ELSE codigo_team END) AS STRING)

CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', CAST(((EXTRACT (YEAR FROM (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', fecha_hora_respuesta))) * 100) + EXTRACT (MONTH FROM (PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', fecha_hora_respuesta)))) AS FLOAT64))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) AS STRING)

CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', CAST(((EXTRACT (YEAR FROM (DATE_ADD(fecha_hora_respuesta ,INTERVAL -1  MONTH))) * 100) + EXTRACT (MONTH FROM (DATE_ADD(fecha_hora_respuesta ,INTERVAL -1  MONTH)))) AS FLOAT64))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) AS STRING)

CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', CAST(((EXTRACT (YEAR FROM hora_extraccion_ticket) * 100) + EXTRACT (MONTH FROM hora_extraccion_ticket)) AS FLOAT64))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) AS STRING)
CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', CAST(((EXTRACT (YEAR FROM fecha_dato) * 100) + EXTRACT (MONTH FROM fecha_dato)) AS FLOAT64))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) AS STRING)

(CASE WHEN (SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%E3%f%f', CAST(fecha_respuesta AS string)) IS NOT NULL) THEN SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%E3%f%f', CAST(fecha_respuesta AS string)) WHEN (SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%%f', CAST(fecha_respuesta AS string)) IS NOT NULL) THEN SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%%f', CAST(fecha_respuesta AS string)) ELSE SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d', CAST(fecha_respuesta AS string)) END)
(FIRST_VALUE(codigo_team) OVER (PARTITION BY idf_pers_ods, AAAAMM ORDER BY hora_extraccion_ticket RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW))

fileTabs.content: select *  REPLACE( CAST((CASE WHEN (CAST((SUBSTRING( AAAAMM, (((LENGTH(AAAAMM)) - 2) + 1), 2)) AS STRING) = '12') THEN (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', ((coalesce(CAST(AAAAMM AS FLOAT64), CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT(AAAAMM, '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INT64), 0)) + 100))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) ELSE (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT('%.0f', ((coalesce(CAST(AAAAMM AS FLOAT64), CAST((REGEXP_EXTRACT(AAAAMM, '^[0-9]+', 0)) AS INT64), 0)) + 1))), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) END) AS STRING) as `AAAAMM` ) from Summarize_175

condition.expression: ((((NOT CAST(((STRPOS((coalesce(LOWER(nps), '')), LOWER(';'))) > 0) AS BOOL)) AND ((motivo_nps <> 'Lia') OR (motivo_nps IS NULL))) AND ((motivo_nps <> 'Lia') OR (motivo_nps IS NULL))) AND ((motivo_nps <> 'Diego') OR (motivo_nps IS NULL)))

fileTabs.content: select *  REPLACE( idf_pers_ods as `idf_pers_ods` ,  encuestadora as `encuestadora` ,  codigo_encuesta as `codigo_encuesta` ,  fecha_hora_respuesta as `fecha_hora_respuesta` ,  destino_contacto as `destino_contacto` ,  nps as `nps` ,  descripcion_encuesta as `descripcion_encuesta` ,  grupo_encuesta as `grupo_encuesta` ,  motivo_nps as `motivo_nps` ,  nps_ejecutivo as `nps_ejecutivo` ,  motivo_nps_ejecutivo as `motivo_nps_ejecutivo` ,  trato_ejecutivo as `trato_ejecutivo` ,  trato_mostrador as `trato_mostrador` ,  trato_caja as `trato_caja` ) from Union_173

condition.expression: ((((descripcion_encuesta <> 'Monitorizacion Sucursales') OR (descripcion_encuesta IS NULL)) OR ((descripcion_encuesta = 'Monitorizacion Sucursales') IS NULL)) AND (NOT ((descripcion_encuesta = 'Monitorizacion Corporate') OR (descripcion_encuesta = 'Monitorizacion Select'))))

properties.expressionToBeApplied: CASE WHEN (column_value = '') THEN NULL ELSE column_value END

condition.expression: (((((NOT ((nps IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(nps)) = 0))) OR (NOT ((nps_ejecutivo IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(nps_ejecutivo)) = 0)))) OR (NOT ((trato_ejecutivo IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(trato_ejecutivo)) = 0)))) OR (NOT ((trato_mostrador IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(trato_mostrador)) = 0)))) OR (NOT ((trato_caja IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(trato_caja)) = 0))))
